message:
test(base91): expand from 82 to 100 tests for basE91 encoding/decoding (wa-182o8)

Add 18 new tests covering ENCTAB digit/quote mappings, DECTAB specific
character lookups, roundtrip byte pairs, val-88 boundary values, mixed
valid/invalid interleaved decoding, and encoding efficiency comparisons
for zero vs random data.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
